title: PR review comparison is remote-first with isolated local fallback
required_behavior: PR review resolves base/head against latest remote refs when remote is reachable
When remote is unavailable, comparison runs in isolated local worktree
forbidden_behavior: PR review proceeds with unresolved base/head refs
PR review proceeds when merge-base is unresolved
PR review silently degrades without isolated fallback
user_visible_expectation: User sees whether review ran in remote or isolated-local mode and the compared SHAs
state_expectation: review comparison mode and resolved base/head/merge-base are available
